heroHeadline: Day 36: Search Underway for Missing US Jet Crew Member — 2 Days to Hormuz Deadline
heroSubtitle: A search operation is underway for a missing crew member of a US jet downed during Iran war operations, per DW reporting. The incident comes as the April 6 Hormuz reopening deadline bears down with no sign of Iranian compliance. Iran continues selective passage under its 'Tehran toll booth' regime; Trump has threatened to strike power plants if the strait is not fully open by Sunday.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-04. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry.
